video_details.title: Market Crash ‘Already Happened’: Trader Reveals Stocks, Bitcoin Next Moves | Lance Breitstein
video_details.description:
🔒 Get 20% off DeleteMe by going to https://joindeleteme.com/DAVIDLIN and use code DAVIDLIN to protect your privacy!

Lance Breitstein, Host of TheOneLanceB, explains why quantum computing topped out, how he trades Bitcoin capitulations using Bollinger bands, and why he believes the S&P 500 already had its major correction in April. 

*This video was recorded on December 8, 2025.
